app.name: Missionry
auth.title: Sign in to Missionry
auth.subtitle: Use the EdgeSpark account that is whitelisted for this workspace.
auth.dev: Session will be resolved by EdgeSpark on the API request.
auth.signup.title: Create your Missionry account
auth.signup.subtitle: Sign up with an email that is already on the workspace access list.
auth.signup.name: Name
auth.signup.cta: Don't have an account? Sign up
auth.signup.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.signup.whitelistHint: Only whitelisted emails can create an account.
auth.signup.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.signup.error: Unable to create account. Contact admin.
auth.reset.unavailable: Password reset is not yet available; contact admin
error.auth.not_whitelisted_user: Your email is not on the access list. Contact admin.
error.auth.user_already_exists: Email already registered. Sign in instead.
PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 8 characters.
error.auth.signup_failed: Unable to create account. Contact admin.
common.crash.title: Something went wrong
common.crash.body: This page hit an error while rendering. Retry, or go back to your missions.
missions.title: Missions
missions.subtitle: Mission-first work with PM ownership, agent filtering, issue progress, and visible sandbox cost.
missions.delete.title: Delete Mission?
missions.delete.confirm: Delete Mission "{{title}}"? This cannot be undone.
missions.modal.title: New Mission
missions.empty.title: Create your first Mission
missions.empty.body: Missions hold the brief, Agent team, work cards, artifacts, and sandbox budget.
workroom.title: Workroom
workroom.details.title: Mission settings
workroom.agentSandboxNote: Each agent has an isolated sandbox in this mission for private work.
workroom.guardrailBody: Paused is normal. Sandboxes start lazily and stop billing when idle.
workroom.newCard.title: New Work Card
workroom.newCard.label: Work card setup
workroom.generatePlan.title: Generate the execution plan
workroom.generatePlan.body: Ask the Mission leader to decompose the objective into executable Work Cards.
workroom.autonomy.title: Mission is running itself
workroom.autonomy.body: The leader plans, queues, and runs Work Cards automatically. Watch status move from queued to running to done.
workroom.autonomy.waitingBody: Forge decomposes the Mission after creation. Cards will appear here without a manual Generate Plan click.
workroom.flow.label: Work card flow
workroom.agentRequests.title: Agent requests
workroom.agentRequests.subtitle: Approve Leader requests to create and recruit another agent.
workroom.chat.title: Mission discussion
workroom.chat.label: Team chat
workroom.chat.placeholder: Write to the Mission... use @ to mention agents
workroom.chat.empty: @mention an agent or invite the Leader to start the conversation.
workroom.environment.title: Environment
workroom.environment.heading: Mission environment
workroom.environment.lifecycle: The environment starts automatically when agents work and pauses when idle to save cost.
workroom.environment.variablesHint: Values are masked after saving and injected only into this Mission.
workroom.activityHint: Recent agent, sandbox, and self-evolution events
workroom.activityEmpty: Activity appears here as agents work in the mission.
workroom.files.title: Mission files
workroom.files.subtitle: Browse files from the mission environment.
workroom.files.select: Select a file to preview it here.
workroom.artifacts.title: Saved artifacts
workroom.artifacts.subtitle: Files saved when a work card completes — durable, they do not vanish when the sandbox pauses.
workroom.artifacts.empty: Artifacts are saved and shown here after a work card completes.
workroom.artifacts.select: Select an artifact to preview it here.
workroom.artifacts.liveSubtitle: Temporary files while the sandbox runs (hidden once paused).
workroom.empty.title: No Workroom data yet
workroom.empty.body: Workroom data appears after the Mission read model loads.
workroom.emptyCards.title: Create your first Work Card
workroom.emptyCards.body: Work Cards assign concrete Mission tasks to Agents.
workroom.emptyAgents.title: Recruit your first Agent
workroom.emptyAgents.body: A Mission needs at least one AgentInstance before work can be assigned.
agents.title: Agent Library
agents.subtitle: Global reusable Agents. Mission-specific memory and sandboxes live on AgentInstances.
agents.modal.title: New Agent
agents.recruit.title: Recruit {{name}}
agents.recruit.noMissions: Create a Mission before recruiting this Agent.
agents.edit.title: Edit {{name}}
agents.empty.title: Create your first Agent
agents.empty.body: Reusable Agents become Mission-specific instances when recruited.
agents.tasks.title: Task queue
agent.title: Agent Control Center
agent.noInstance: Select an agent from a Workroom mission team.
agent.empty.title: No Agent selected
agent.empty.body: Open an Agent from a Mission team to inspect its private sandbox and memory.
artifacts.title: Artifacts
artifacts.subtitle: Outputs promoted from Mission workspaces.
artifacts.empty.title: Run a Work Card to produce artifacts
artifacts.empty.body: Artifacts appear here after a Mission promotes files, notes, or reports from its workspace.
growth.title: Growth Center
growth.subtitle: Audit self-evolution after the fact and enable zero-cost candidates only when useful.
growth.costNote: Candidate generation does not start sandboxes; cost begins only after enablement.
growth.candidateFallback: Candidate evidence will include linked audit events when the endpoint is available.
growth.empty.feed: Self-evolution events will appear here after Agents update memory, skills, or identity.
growth.empty.candidates: Candidate Agents appear here when Mission patterns repeat enough to suggest reuse.
growth.empty.rollbacks: Rollback entries appear here after audited Agent self-updates.
growth.empty.feed.title: No self-evolution events yet
growth.empty.feed.body: Agent memory, skill, and identity updates will appear here from the Mission event stream.
growth.empty.candidates.title: No reusable candidates yet
growth.empty.candidates.body: Candidates appear after repeated Mission patterns suggest a reusable Agent, skill, or template.
growth.empty.rollbacks.title: No rollbacks yet
growth.empty.rollbacks.body: Rollback history appears after an audited self-update is restored.
budget.title: Budget controls
budget.subtitle: Daily and global limits with per-Mission spend and live cost events.
budget.empty.title: No Mission spend yet
budget.empty.body: Per-Mission spend appears here after work cards or sandbox activity emit cost events.
environment.title: Mission Environment
environment.subtitle: Credentials and variables are Mission/sandbox scoped, shared by Agents unless instance access is restricted.
environment.empty.title: No Mission environment selected
environment.empty.body: Open a Mission to inspect injected credentials, variables, and sandbox access.
account.title: Account
account.subtitle: Manage your display name and account password.
account.passwordMin: New password must be at least 8 characters.
chat.title: Direct Agent Thread
chat.subtitle: Mission-scoped 1:1 thread; it does not grant cross-project access by itself.
chat.empty.title: No direct messages yet
chat.empty.body: Send the first message to this Mission-scoped Agent thread.
admin.title: Admin Console
admin.subtitle: Super-admin surface for spend, users, whitelist, and all Missions.
admin.empty.users.title: No users yet
admin.empty.users.body: Users appear here after whitelisted accounts sign in.
admin.empty.whitelist.title: No whitelist entries yet
admin.empty.whitelist.body: Add an email or domain suffix to grant workspace access.
admin.empty.missions.title: No Missions yet
admin.empty.missions.body: All Missions appear here once users create work.
workroom.cardDetail.label: Work card
workroom.cardDetail.discussionHint: @ another agent here to ask or delegate a small task — no new card needed; the mentioned agent replies and acts here.
workroom.cardDetail.discussionEmpty: No discussion yet. @ an agent to start collaborating.
workroom.cardDetail.discussionPlaceholde: @Agent say something… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
agents.edit.memoryPlaceholder: This agent's cross-mission lessons / conventions / tool quirks…
agents.edit.memoryHint: Specific to this agent; the self-review appends here, and you can edit it.
agents.edit.userProfilePlaceholder: How to address you, communication preferences, things to avoid…
agents.edit.userProfileHint: Your profile shared by all agents; the self-review keeps it updated.
concierge.title: Concierge (Admin)
concierge.name: Concierge
concierge.subtitle: Your workspace chief-of-staff
concierge.intro: I can build agents, create missions and assign a leader, and show you what every agent and mission is doing. I orchestrate — I don't do task work myself.
concierge.empty: Try: "build an agent that writes copy" or "create a mission: weekly report, with Forge as leader".
concierge.placeholder: Ask the concierge to do something… (Enter to send)
skills.title: Skill library
skills.subtitle: Team shared skills
skills.intro: Shared team skills. Open a skill and check the agents to equip it on.
skills.emptyBody: Ask the Concierge to find/author skills, or import one from GitHub.
